global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting a food delivery service with clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Quick food delivery with special late-night deals.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: PlateSprint Logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the name 'PlateSprint' in bold, modern typography, set against a vibrant background.

elements.label: Food Icons
elements.description: Three simple, outlined icons representing food items, arranged horizontally in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner in Minutes
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Dinner in minutes' in a clear, easy-to-read font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Late-night Deals
elements.description: Smaller text below the main headline that reads 'Late-night deals available', providing additional context.

elements.label: Shop Now Button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in a contrasting color, inviting users to take action.
